title: Elbaf’s Children Are in Danger
description: On pages 5–7, this part follows World Government, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Nami as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's nothing like the ones I was pictures though!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm afraid this one likely holds an even higher rank... A God's knight...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aaaah!! WH-WHAT THE HECK IS THIS ARROW THING?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAAH!! GO AWAY!! It won't stop chasing me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's how it was supposed to go...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some among the humans realized what lay in store.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And they made sure the entire world would know!!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
